title: Program Development Life cycle
summary: 9618 AS — analysis, design, coding, testing, and maintenance in the software lifecycle.
learningObjectives: Describe stages of the program development life cycle.
Outline testing strategies including normal, boundary, extreme.
Discuss maintenance types: corrective, adaptive, perfective.

simpleExplanation.title: From problem to maintained software
simpleExplanation.summary: Development follows analysis → design → coding → testing → maintenance. Testing uses data sets to verify correctness.
steps: Design: structure charts, pseudocode, data dictionaries.
Maintenance: fix bugs, adapt to new needs.

sections.content: **Life cycle** (12.1) links Paper 2 theory to **Paper 3 practical**. Know **test data types** with examples.
